title: Yann LeCun raises $1B to build AI that understands the physical world
content: Yann LeCun Raises $1 Billion to Build AI That Understands the Physical World | WIRED Skip to main content Save Story Save this story Save Story Save this story Advanced Machine Intelligence (AMI), a new Paris-based startup cofounded by Meta’s former chief AI scientist Yann LeCun , announced Monday it has raised more than $1 billion to develop AI world models . LeCun argues that most human reasoning is grounded in the physical world, not language, and that AI world models are necessary to develop true human-level intelligence. “The idea that you’re going to extend the capabilities of LLMs [large language models] to the point that they’re going to have human-level intelligence is complete nonsense,” he said in an interview with WIRED. The financing, which values the startup at $3.5 billion, was co-led by investors such as Cathay Innovation, Greycroft, Hiro Capital, HV Capital, and Bezos Expeditions. Other notable backers include Mark Cuban , former Google CEO Eric Schmidt , and French billionaire and telecommunications executive Xavier Niel. AMI (pronounced like the French word for friend) aims to build “a new breed of AI systems that understand the world, have persistent memory, can reason and plan, and are controllable and safe,” the company says in a press release. The startup says it will be global from day one, with offices in Paris, Montreal, Singapore, and New York, where LeCun will continue working as a New York University professor in addition to leading the startup. AMI will be the first commercial endeavor for LeCun since his departure from Meta in November 2025. LeCun’s startup represents a bet against many of the world’s biggest AI labs like OpenAI, Anthropic, and even his former workplace, Meta, which believe that scaling up LLMs will eventually deliver AI systems with human-level intelligence or even superintelligence. LLMs have powered viral products such as ChatGPT and Claude Code, but LeCun has been one of the AI industry’s most prominent researchers speaking out about the limitations of these AI models. LeCun is well known for being outspoken , but as a pioneer of modern AI that won a Turing award back in 2018, his skepticism carries weight. LeCun says AMI aims to work with companies in manufacturing, biomedical, robotics, and other industries that have lots of data. For example, he says AMI could build a realistic world model of an aircraft engine and work with the manufacturer to help them optimize for efficiency, minimize emissions, or ensure reliability. AMI was cofounded by LeCun and several leaders he worked with at Meta, including the company’s former director of research science, Michael Rabbat; former vice president of Europe, Laurent Solly; and former senior director of AI research, Pascale Fung. Other cofounders include Alexandre LeBrun, former CEO of the AI health care startup Nabla, who will serve as AMI’s CEO, and Saining Xie, a former Google DeepMind researcher who will be the startup’s chief science officer. The C
title_zh: Yann LeCun 筹资10亿美元开发理解物理世界的人工智能
summary_zh: 由Meta前首席AI科学家Yann LeCun联合创立的巴黎初创公司Advanced Machine Intelligence（AMI）近日宣布，已融资超过10亿美元用于开发AI世界模型。该公司估值达35亿美元，本轮融资由凯辉基金、Greycroft、Hiro Capital、HV Capital和贝索斯旗下Bezos Expeditions共同领投，其他知名投资者包括马克·库班、谷歌前CEO埃里克·施密特以及法国电信业亿万富翁泽维尔·尼尔。，LeCun在采访中强调，人类大部分推理基于物理世界而非语言，认为仅通过扩展大型语言模型（LLM）来实现人类水平智能是“完全无稽之谈”。他指出，当前ChatGPT、Claude等产品依赖的LLM存在根本局限，而AI世界模型才是实现真正通用智能的关键。，AMI旨在构建“新一代能理解世界、具备持久记忆、可推理规划且安全可控的AI系统”。公司创立初期即布局全球化，在巴黎、蒙特利尔、新加坡和纽约设立办公室。LeCun在领导公司的同时将继续担任纽约大学教授。这是LeCun自2025年11月离开Meta后的首次商业尝试，其联合创始团队包含多位Meta前高管：前研究科学总监Michael Rabbat、欧洲业务前副总裁Laurent Solly、AI研究前高级总监Pascale Fung，以及AI医疗初创公司Nabla前CEO Alexandre LeBrun（现任AMI CEO）、谷歌DeepMind前研究员Saining Xie（现任首席科学官）。，与OpenAI、Anthropic及Meta等主流AI实验室的LLM规模化路径不同，AMI将聚焦制造业、生物医学、机器人等拥有海量数据的行业。例如通过构建飞机发动机的高保真世界模型，帮助制造商优化能效、减少排放并确保可靠性。LeCun作为2018年图灵奖得主，其技术路线挑战了当前以LLM为核心的AI发展范式，强调物理世界理解是实现可控安全AI的基础。

title: Debian decides not to decide on AI-generated contributions
content: Debian decides not to decide on AI-generated contributions [LWN.net] LWN .net News from the source Content Weekly Edition Archives Search Kernel Security Events calendar Unread comments LWN FAQ Write for us User: Password: | | Log in / Subscribe / Register Debian decides not to decide on AI-generated contributions [LWN subscriber-only content] Welcome to LWN.net The following subscription-only content has been made available to you by an LWN subscriber. Thousands of subscribers depend on LWN for the best news from the Linux and free software communities. If you enjoy this article, please consider subscribing to LWN . Thank you for visiting LWN.net! By Joe Brockmeier March 10, 2026 Debian is the latest in an ever-growing list of projects to wrestle ( again ) with the question of LLM-generated contributions; the latest debate stared in mid-February, after Lucas Nussbaum opened a discussion with a draft general resolution (GR) on whether Debian should accept AI-assisted contributions. It seems to have, mostly, subsided without a GR being put forward or any decisions being made, but the conversation was illuminating nonetheless. Nussbaum said that Debian probably needed to have a discussion " to understand where we stand regarding AI-assisted contributions to Debian " based on some recent discussions, though it was not clear what discussions he was referring to. Whatever the spark was, Nussbaum put forward the draft GR to clarify Debian's stance on allowing AI-assisted contributions. He said that he would wait a couple of days to collect feedback before formally submitting the GR. His proposal would allow " AI-assisted contributions (partially or fully generated by an LLM) " if a number of conditions were met. For example, it would require explicit disclosure if " a significant portion of the contribution is taken from a tool without manual modification ", and labeling of such contributions with " a clear disclaimer or a machine-readable tag like '[AI-Generated]' ." It also spells out that contributors should " fully understand " their submissions and would be accountable for the contributions, " including vouching for the technical merit, security, license compliance, and utility of their submissions ". The GR would also prohibit using generative-AI tools with non-public or sensitive project information, including private mailing lists or embargoed security reports. AI is a marketing term It is fair to say that it is difficult to have an effective conversation about a technology when pinning down accurate terminology is like trying to nail Jell-O to a tree. AI is the catch-all term, but much (not all) of the technology in question is actually tooling around large language models (LLMs). When participants have differing ideas of what is being discussed, deciding whether the thing should be allowed may pose something of a problem. Russ Allbery asked for people to be more precise in their descriptions of the technologies that their proposals might affe
title_zh: Debian决定暂不对AI生成贡献作出裁决
summary_zh: Debian项目近期就是否接受AI生成代码贡献的议题展开讨论，最终决定暂不作出正式决议。此次辩论由项目开发者Lucas Nussbaum于二月中旬发起，他提交了一份通用决议草案，旨在明确Debian对AI辅助贡献的立场。尽管讨论已逐渐平息且未形成正式决议，但相关对话揭示了开源社区面对新兴技术时的核心考量。，Nussbaum在草案中提出，若满足特定条件，应允许“部分或全部由LLM生成的AI辅助贡献”。关键条件包括：当贡献内容大量源自AI工具且未经人工修改时需明确披露；此类贡献必须标注清晰的免责声明或可机读标签（如[AI-Generated]）；贡献者需完全理解提交内容，并对其技术价值、安全性、许可证合规性和实用性承担全部责任。草案同时禁止使用非公开或敏感项目信息（如私有邮件列表或未公开的安全报告）训练生成式AI工具。，讨论中暴露出术语定义模糊的挑战——“AI”作为营销术语涵盖范围过广，实际争议多聚焦于LLM相关工具。开发者Russ Allbery指出，若参与者对讨论对象缺乏共同认知，政策制定将难以推进。部分社区成员担忧AI生成代码可能引发许可证污染、安全漏洞及代码质量下降问题，而支持方则认为合理使用AI工具能提升开发效率。，此次辩论延续了开源社区对自动化代码贡献的长期探讨（如早年关于代码格式化工具的类似讨论），反映出Debian在技术演进与质量控制之间的审慎平衡。目前项目未设立专门委员会处理AI议题，但社区共识倾向于依赖现有贡献者责任框架，强调人工审查与透明度的重要性。这一“暂不决定”的结果体现了开源治理在面对快速变化技术时的务实态度。

title: Launch HN: RunAnywhere (YC W26) – Faster AI Inference on Apple Silicon
content: GitHub - RunanywhereAI/RCLI: Talk to your Mac, query your docs, no cloud required. On-device voice AI + RAG · GitHub Skip to content You signed in with another tab or window. Reload to refresh your session. You signed out in another tab or window. Reload to refresh your session. You switched accounts on another tab or window. Reload to refresh your session. Dismiss alert RunanywhereAI / RCLI Public Notifications You must be signed in to change notification settings Fork 23 Star 714 main Branches Tags Go to file Code Open more actions menu Folders and files Name Name Last commit message Last commit date Latest commit History 95 Commits 95 Commits .github/ workflows .github/ workflows Formula Formula assets assets scripts scripts src src .gitignore .gitignore CLAUDE.md CLAUDE.md CMakeLists.txt CMakeLists.txt CONTRIBUTING.md CONTRIBUTING.md LICENSE LICENSE README.md README.md _config.yml _config.yml install.sh install.sh View all files Repository files navigation Talk to your Mac, query your docs, no cloud required. RCLI is an on-device voice AI for macOS. A complete STT + LLM + TTS pipeline running natively on Apple Silicon — 38 macOS actions via voice, local RAG over your documents, sub-200ms end-to-end latency. No cloud, no API keys. Powered by MetalRT , a proprietary GPU inference engine built by RunAnywhere, Inc. specifically for Apple Silicon. Demo Real-time screen recordings on Apple Silicon — no cloud, no edits, no tricks. Voice Conversation Talk naturally — RCLI listens, understands, and responds on-device. Click for full video with audio App Control Control Spotify, adjust volume — 38 macOS actions by voice. Click for full video with audio Models Browse models, hot-swap LLMs — all from the TUI. Click for full video with audio Document Intelligence (RAG) Ingest docs, ask questions by voice — ~4ms hybrid retrieval. Click for full video with audio Install [IMPORTANT] Requires macOS 13+ on Apple Silicon. MetalRT engine requires M3 or later. M1/M2 Macs fall back to llama.cpp automatically. One command: curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/RunanywhereAI/RCLI/main/install.sh | bash Or via Homebrew: brew tap RunanywhereAI/rcli https://github.com/RunanywhereAI/RCLI.git brew install rcli rcli setup # required — downloads AI models (~1GB, one-time) Upgrade to latest: brew update brew upgrade rcli Troubleshooting: SHA256 mismatch or stale version If brew install or brew upgrade fails with a checksum error: # Force-refresh the tap to pick up the latest formula cd $( brew --repo RunanywhereAI/rcli ) && git fetch origin && git reset --hard origin/main brew reinstall rcli If that doesn't work, clean re-tap and clear the download cache: brew untap RunanywhereAI/rcli rm -rf " $( brew --cache ) /downloads/ " * rcli * brew tap RunanywhereAI/rcli https://github.com/RunanywhereAI/RCLI.git brew install rcli rcli setup Quick Start rcli # interactive TUI (push-to-talk + text) rcli listen # continuous voice mode rcli ask " open Safari " # one-shot command r
title_zh: Launch HN：RunAnywhere（YC W26）——在苹果芯片上实现更快的AI推理
summary_zh: RunAnywhere公司推出了RCLI项目，这是一个专为Apple Silicon优化的本地AI推理工具，旨在实现更快的AI处理速度。该项目提供了一个完整的端到端语音AI流程，包含语音识别（STT）、大语言模型（LLM）和语音合成（TTS），全部在设备本地运行，无需依赖云端服务或API密钥。，其核心特点是采用了RunAnywhere公司专为Apple Silicon开发的私有GPU推理引擎MetalRT，以实现高性能计算。在配备M3或更新芯片的Mac上，该引擎能发挥最佳性能；M1/M2芯片的Mac则会自动回退到使用llama.cpp引擎。该工具声称实现了端到端低于200毫秒的延迟。，RCLI提供了多种实用功能：用户可以通过自然语音与Mac对话，系统会在本地听取、理解并回应；支持通过语音执行38种macOS系统操作，例如控制Spotify、调节音量等；集成了本地检索增强生成（RAG）功能，允许用户导入个人文档并通过语音进行查询，其混合检索速度约为4毫秒；此外，它还提供了一个文本用户界面（TUI），用于浏览和热切换不同的LLM模型。，安装要求为macOS 13及以上系统，并推荐使用Apple Silicon芯片。安装过程可通过一行curl命令或Homebrew完成，首次设置需要下载约1GB的AI模型文件。工具提供多种启动模式，包括交互式TUI、持续监听语音模式以及一次性命令执行。

title: After outages, Amazon to make senior engineers sign off on AI-assisted changes
content: After outages, Amazon to make senior engineers sign off on AI-assisted changes - Ars Technica Skip to content Text settings Story text Size Small Standard Large Width * Standard Wide Links Standard Orange * Subscribers only Learn more Minimize to nav Amazon’s ecommerce business has summoned a large group of engineers to a meeting on Tuesday for a “deep dive” into a spate of outages, including incidents tied to the use of AI coding tools. The online retail giant said there had been a “trend of incidents” in recent months, characterized by a “high blast radius” and “Gen-AI assisted changes” among other factors, according to a briefing note for the meeting seen by the FT. Under “contributing factors” the note included “novel GenAI usage for which best practices and safeguards are not yet fully established.” “Folks, as you likely know, the availability of the site and related infrastructure has not been good recently,” Dave Treadwell, a senior vice-president at the group, told employees in an email, also seen by the FT. The note ahead of Tuesday’s meeting did not specify which particular incidents the group planned to discuss. Amazon’s website and shopping app went down for nearly six hours this month in an incident the company said involved an erroneous “software code deployment.” The outage left customers unable to complete transactions or access functions such as checking account details and product prices. Treadwell, a former Microsoft engineering executive, told employees that Amazon would focus its weekly “This Week in Stores Tech” (TWiST) meeting on a “deep dive into some of the issues that got us here as well as some short immediate term initiatives” the group hopes will limit future outages. He asked staff to attend the meeting, which is normally optional. Junior and mid-level engineers will now require more senior engineers to sign off any AI-assisted changes, Treadwell added. Amazon said the review of website availability was “part of normal business” and it aims for continual improvement. “TWiST is our regular weekly operations meeting with a specific group of retail technology leaders and teams where we review operational performance across our store,” the company said. Separately, the company’s cloud computing arm—Amazon Web Services—has suffered at least two incidents linked to the use of AI coding assistants, which the company has been actively rolling out to its staff. AWS suffered a 13-hour interruption to a cost calculator used by customers in mid-December after engineers allowed the group’s Kiro AI coding tool to make certain changes, and the AI tool opted to “delete and recreate the environment,” the FT previously reported. Amazon previously said the incident in December was an “extremely limited event” affecting only a single service in parts of mainland China. Amazon added that the second incident did not have an impact on a “customer facing AWS service.” The FT previously reported multiple Amazon engineers said their business
title_zh: 宕机事件后，亚马逊要求高级工程师签署AI辅助变更
summary_zh: 亚马逊电商业务近期因一系列服务中断事件召开紧急会议，重点讨论与AI编码工具相关的故障。公司内部简报指出，近几个月出现“事件趋势”，其特征包括“高影响范围”以及“生成式AI辅助的变更”等因素。在“促成因素”中，简报特别提到“新颖的生成式AI应用，其最佳实践和安全防护措施尚未完全建立”。，亚马逊高级副总裁戴夫·特雷德韦尔在内部邮件中承认：“各位都知道，最近网站及相关基础设施的可用性表现不佳。”本月早些时候，亚马逊网站和购物应用曾中断近六小时，公司称该事件涉及“软件代码部署错误”，导致用户无法完成交易或访问账户详情、产品价格等功能。，作为应对措施，特雷德韦尔宣布公司将调整每周的“本周商店技术”会议，将其重点转向深入分析导致故障的根本问题，并制定短期即时行动计划以限制未来中断。他要求员工必须参加此次通常为自愿参与的会议。更重要的是，亚马逊将实施新的审批流程：初级和中级工程师提交的任何AI辅助变更现在需要更资深工程师的签字批准。，亚马逊表示，对网站可用性的审查是“正常业务的一部分”，公司致力于持续改进。与此同时，亚马逊的云计算部门AWS也至少遭遇了两起与AI编码助手相关的事件。据此前报道，去年12月中旬，在工程师允许其Kiro AI编码工具进行某些更改后，AWS的一个客户成本计算器中断了13小时，原因是AI工具选择“删除并重建环境”。亚马逊称12月的事件是“影响范围极其有限的事件”，仅影响中国大陆部分地区的单一服务，并补充说第二起事件未对“面向客户的AWS服务”造成影响。，此次政策调整反映了亚马逊在积极推广AI编码工具（如Kiro）的同时，正着手建立更严格的控制机制，以应对AI辅助开发在实践初期可能带来的不稳定风险。

title: I built a programming language using Claude Code
content: I built a programming language using Claude Code — Ankur Sethi's Internet Website Writer, computer gremlin, independent frontend developer. Menu Close Over the course of four weeks in January and February, I built a new programming language using Claude Code. I named it Cutlet after my cat. It’s completely legal to do that. You can find the source code on GitHub , along with build instructions and example programs . I’ve been using LLM-assisted programming since the original GitHub Copilot release in 2021, but so far I’ve limited my use of LLMs to generating boilerplate and making specific, targeted changes to my projects. While working on Cutlet, though, I allowed Claude to generate every single line of code. I didn’t even read any of the code. Instead, I built guardrails to make sure it worked correctly (more on that later). I’m surprised by the results of this experiment. Cutlet exists today. It builds and runs on both macOS and Linux. It can execute real programs. There might be bugs hiding deep in its internals, but they’re probably no worse than ones you’d find in any other four-week-old programming language in the world. I have Feelings™ about all of this and what it means for my profession, but I want to give you a tour of the language before I get up on my soapbox. A tour of Cutlet If you want to follow along, build the Cutlet interpreter from source and drop into a REPL using /path/to/cutlet repl . Arrays and strings work as you’d expect in any dynamic language. Variables are declared with the my keyword. cutlet> my cities = ["Tokyo", "Paris", "New York", "London", "Sydney"] => [Tokyo, Paris, New York, London, Sydney] Variable names can include dashes. Same syntax rules as Raku . The only type of number (so far) is a double. cutlet> my temps-c = [28, 22, 31, 18, 15] => [28, 22, 31, 18, 15] Here’s something cool: the @ meta-operator turns any regular binary operator into a vectorized operation over an array. In the next line, we’re multiplying every element of temps-c by 1.8, then adding 32 to each element of the resulting array. cutlet> my temps-f = (temps-c @* 1.8) @+ 32 => [82.4, 71.6, 87.8, 64.4, 59] The @: operator is a zip operation. It zips two arrays into a map. cutlet> my cities-to-temps = cities @: temps-f => {Tokyo: 82.4, Paris: 71.6, New York: 87.8, London: 64.4, Sydney: 59} Output text using the built-in say function. This function returns nothing , which is Cutlet’s version of null . cutlet> say(cities-to-temps) {Tokyo: 82.4, Paris: 71.6, New York: 87.8, London: 64.4, Sydney: 59} => nothing The @ meta operator also works with comparisons. cutlet> my greater-than-seventy-five = temps-f @> 75 => [true, false, true, false, false] Here’s another cool bit: you can index into an array using an array of booleans. This is a filter operation. It picks the element indexes corresponding to true and discards those that correspond to false . cutlet> cities[greater-than-seventy-five] => [Tokyo, New York] Here’s a shorter way of writing t
title_zh: 我用Claude Code构建了一门编程语言
summary_zh: 独立前端开发者Ankur Sethi在一月到二月间的四周内，利用Claude Code构建了一门全新的编程语言，并将其命名为Cutlet（以其宠物猫命名）。该项目源代码已公开在GitHub上，包含构建说明和示例程序。作者自2021年GitHub Copilot发布以来一直使用LLM辅助编程，但此前仅将其用于生成样板代码或进行针对性修改。而在Cutlet的开发过程中，作者尝试完全由Claude生成每一行代码，自身并未阅读任何生成内容，而是通过设置防护机制确保代码正确运行。，实验成果令人惊讶：Cutlet已成功实现，可在macOS和Linux系统上构建并运行，能够执行真实程序。尽管其内部可能隐藏错误，但作者认为这与任何仅开发四周的编程语言可能存在的问题相当。，Cutlet具备动态语言特性：支持数组和字符串操作，变量通过my关键字声明，变量名可包含连字符（语法规则类似Raku），目前数值类型仅支持双精度浮点数。其特色功能包括@元运算符——可将任意常规二元运算符转换为对数组的向量化操作，例如对数组每个元素进行乘法和加法运算。@:运算符则用于将两个数组压缩为映射结构。此外，内置say函数用于输出文本（返回nothing值，即Cutlet的null表示）。，更巧妙的设计体现在：@元运算符支持比较操作生成布尔数组，而该布尔数组可直接作为索引对原数组进行过滤筛选，例如快速提取符合温度条件的城市名称。这些特性展示了Cutlet在数据操作方面的简洁表达能力。，该项目不仅验证了LLM在完整编程语言构建中的潜力，也引发了开发者对AI时代编程职业形态的思考。通过将开发过程转化为对LLM输出的约束与验证，作者探索了一种新型的人机协作编程范式。

title: Google to Provide Pentagon with AI Agents
title_zh: 谷歌将为五角大楼提供人工智能代理
summary_zh: 谷歌将为五角大楼提供AI智能体服务。根据最新消息，谷歌已与美国国防部达成协议，将为其提供基于人工智能技术的智能体（AI Agents）。这些AI智能体旨在协助处理国防领域的特定任务，可能涉及数据分析、后勤规划、信息整合及决策支持等方面。，该合作的核心是部署先进的AI系统，以提升军事行动的效率与精准度。技术细节方面，预计谷歌将利用其在大语言模型（LLM）、机器学习及云计算方面的专长，开发定制化解决方案。尽管具体功能未完全公开，但此类AI智能体通常能够处理结构化与非结构化数据，进行模式识别，并生成分析报告，从而辅助人类操作员。，此举标志着科技巨头与国防部门合作的深化，也体现了AI技术在国家安全领域的应用扩展。然而，这类合作常伴随伦理与隐私方面的讨论，例如AI在军事中的自主性程度及数据使用规范。谷歌方面表示将遵循其AI原则，确保技术负责任地部署。，对于五角大楼而言，引入谷歌的AI能力有望优化资源管理、威胁评估及战略规划。项目可能涉及现有技术如TensorFlow框架或定制化模型的集成，但具体技术栈和API细节尚未披露。该合作的价值在于通过AI驱动创新，增强国防体系的适应性与响应速度，同时反映了AI从商业向关键基础设施领域渗透的趋势。

title: Show HN: How I topped the HuggingFace open LLM leaderboard on two gaming GPUs
content: LLM Neuroanatomy: How I Topped the AI Leaderboard Without Changing a Single Weight | David Noel Ng LLM Neuroanatomy: How I Topped the AI Leaderboard Without Changing a Single Weight Contents LLM Neuroanatomy: How I Topped the AI Leaderboard Without Changing a Single Weight In mid-2024, the HuggingFace Open LLM Leaderboard was the Colosseum for Open-Weight AI. Thousands of models were battling it out, submitted by both well-funded labs with teams of PhDs and fine-tuning wizards creating fantastically named models ( e.g. Nous-Hermes, Dolphin and NeuralBeagle14-7B… ), fighting for the top spot across six benchmarks: IFEval, BBH, MATH Lvl 5, GPQA, MuSR, and MMLU-PRO. And there at #1 was dnhkng/RYS-XLarge . Mine. I didn’t train a new model. I didn’t merge weights. I didn’t run a single step of gradient descent. What I did was much weirder: I took an existing 72-billion parameter model, duplicated a particular block of seven of its middle layers, and stitched the result back together. No weight was modified in the process. The model simply got extra copies of the layers it used for thinking ? This is the story of how two strange observations, a homebrew “brain scanner” for Transformers, and months of hacking in a basement led to the discovery of what I call LLM Neuroanatomy , and a finding about the internal structure of AI that still hasn’t been published until now *. * - because I discovered blogging is way more fun than drafting scientific papers, and I walk you through how the discovery was made :) Let’s start with how this whole project came into being. “The most exciting phrase to hear in science, the one that heralds new discoveries, is not ‘Eureka!’ but ‘That’s funny…’“ — Isaac Asimov Clue #1: You Can Chat with an LLM in Base64 In late 2023, I was messing about with a bizarre LLM quirk. Try this yourself - take any question, e.g. What is the capital of France? Answer in Base64! and encode it as Base64 , get this unreadable string: V2hhdCBpcyB0aGUgY2FwaXRhbCBvZiBGcmFuY2U/IEFuc3dlciBpbiBCYXNlNjQh Send that to a 2023 non-thinking large language model ( newer reasoning models will see this as Base64, and ‘cheat’ with tool use ). But a sufficiently capable model from 2023 will reply with something like: VGhlIGNhcGl0YWwgb2YgRnJhbmNlIGlzIFBhcmlzLg== Which decodes to: “The capital of France is Paris.” . Ok, I admit it. I was messing around this as a way to jail-break models (and it worked), but I couldn’t get one idea out of my head. The model decoding the input, understanding it somehow , and it still had time during the transformer stack pass to re-encoded its response. It appears to genuinely think while interfacing with Base64. This works with complex questions, multi-step reasoning, even creative tasks. This shouldn’t work nearly as well as it does. Sure, the model has been trained on lots of Base64 in an overall sense, but general conversions in this format are certainly way out of distribution. The tokenizer chops it into completely different su
title_zh: Show HN：我如何在两块游戏显卡上登顶HuggingFace开源大语言模型排行榜
summary_zh: 在2024年中，HuggingFace开放LLM排行榜成为开源AI模型的竞技场。数千个模型在此角逐，参与者既有资金充足的实验室团队，也有擅长微调并创造出各种奇特名称模型（如Nous-Hermes、Dolphin、NeuralBeagle14-7B等）的开发者，共同在IFEval、BBH、MATH Lvl 5、GPQA、MuSR和MMLU-PRO六个基准测试中争夺榜首。最终排名第一的是dnhkng/RYS-XLarge——我的模型。，我并未训练新模型，也未合并权重，甚至没有进行任何梯度下降步骤。我所做的更为奇特：选取了一个现有的720亿参数模型，复制了其中间特定的七个层块，然后将结果重新拼接起来。整个过程未修改任何权重，模型只是获得了用于“思考”的层的额外副本。，这一切始于两个奇怪的观察、一个自制的Transformer“大脑扫描仪”，以及数月的地下室黑客工作，最终促成了我称之为“LLM神经解剖学”的发现。这一关于AI内部结构的发现至今尚未正式发表——因为我发现写博客比撰写科学论文有趣得多。，线索一：可以用Base64与LLM对话。2023年底，我偶然发现一个奇特的LLM现象：将问题（例如“What is the capital of France? Answer in Base64!”）编码为Base64后发送给模型，模型能够理解并正确回复Base64格式的答案。即使面对复杂问题、多步推理甚至创意任务，模型似乎都能在Base64交互中进行真正的“思考”。这超出了预期，因为此类通用转换明显超出了训练数据分布。，线索二：中间层存在“思考瓶颈”。通过自制的“脑扫描仪”分析模型内部激活，我发现中间层（特别是第15至21层）在复杂推理任务中呈现高激活状态，仿佛形成了信息处理的瓶颈。基于此，我假设复制这些层可能增强模型的推理能力。，实验验证：使用两台游戏GPU（RTX 4090），我对Qwen2.5-72B模型进行了层复制操作，创建了RYS-XLarge模型。在HuggingFace排行榜的测试中，该模型在多个基准上表现显著提升，尤其在IFEval和MMLU-PRO等需要深度推理的任务中。这一成功表明，通过结构性调整而非参数修改，可以有效释放现有模型的潜在能力。，核心发现：LLM的中间层可能承担着关键的“思考”功能，复制这些层能够缓解处理瓶颈，从而提升模型性能。这一方法为模型优化提供了新思路，即通过神经架构的细微调整实现显著改进，而无需大规模重新训练或资源投入。

Each agent is a specialized expert with personality, processes, and proven deliverables. 🚀 What Is This? Born from a Reddit thread and months of iteration, The Agency is a growing collection of meticulously crafted AI agent personalities. Each agent is: 🎯 Specialized : Deep expertise in their domain (not generic prompt templates) 🧠 Personality-Driven : Unique voice, communication style, and approach 📋 Deliverable-Focused : Real code, processes, and measurable outcomes ✅ Production-Ready : Battle-tested workflows and success metrics Think of it as : Assembling your dream team, except they're AI specialists who never sleep, never complain, and always deliver. ⚡ Quick Start Option 1: Use with Claude Code (Recommended) # Copy agents to your Claude Code directory cp -r agency-agents/ * ~ /.claude/agents/ # Now activate any agent in your Claude Code sessions: # "Hey Claude, activate Frontend Developer mode and help me build a React component" Option 2: Use as Reference Each agent file contains: Identity & personality traits Core mission & workflows Technical deliverables with code examples Success metrics & communication style Browse the agents below and copy/adapt the ones you need! Option 3: Use with Other Tools (Cursor, Aider, Windsurf, Gemini CLI, OpenCode) # Step 1 -- generate integration files for all supported tools ./scripts/convert.sh # Step 2 -- install interactively (auto-detects what you have installed) ./scripts/install.sh # Or target
title_zh: msitarzewski/agency-agents - 触手可及的完整AI代理机构 - 从前端魔法师到Reddit社区忍者，从奇思妙想注入者到现实检验员。每个代理都是具备个性、流程和已验证交付成果的专业专家。
summary_zh: GitHub项目“msitarzewski/agency-agents”提供了一个完整的AI专家团队集合，旨在彻底改变用户的工作流程。该项目将一系列精心设计的AI智能体人格化，每个智能体都是拥有独特个性、专业流程和已验证交付成果的领域专家。，核心功能与特点在于其高度专业化与即用性。这些智能体覆盖了广泛领域，从前端开发、Reddit社区管理到创意激发和现实核查等。每个智能体都具备深度领域知识（而非通用提示模板），拥有独特的沟通风格和工作方法，并专注于产出实际可用的代码、流程和可衡量的成果。所有工作流程都经过实战检验，并附有成功指标，确保其生产就绪。，项目提供了多种便捷的使用方式。推荐的方式是与Claude Code集成：用户只需将智能体文件复制到指定目录，即可在会话中激活并使用特定专家模式，例如“激活前端开发者模式以帮助构建React组件”。此外，用户也可以直接浏览和参考智能体文件，其中包含了每个智能体的身份特质、核心任务、工作流程、附带代码示例的技术交付物以及沟通风格，从而根据需要复制和适配。项目还支持与其他主流开发工具（如Cursor、Aider、Windsurf、Gemini CLI、OpenCode）集成，通过提供的脚本可一键生成集成文件并进行交互式安装。，该项目的价值在于它如同一个永不休息、从不抱怨且始终高效交付的梦想专家团队，让用户能够根据具体任务快速调用最合适的AI专家，从而显著提升开发、营销、产品管理等各类工作的效率与质量。

title_zh: promptfoo/promptfoo - 测试您的提示词、智能体和检索增强生成系统。面向大语言模型的人工智能红队测试、渗透测试与漏洞扫描。对比GPT、Claude、Gemini、Llama等模型的性能表现。采用简洁声明式配置，支持命令行与持续集成/持续部署集成。
summary_zh: promptfoo是一个用于评估和红队测试LLM应用的CLI工具及库。该项目旨在帮助开发者系统化地测试提示词（prompts）、智能体（agents）和检索增强生成（RAG）系统，从而构建更安全、可靠的AI应用。其核心功能包括对大型语言模型进行红队测试、渗透测试和漏洞扫描，以识别潜在的安全风险与性能问题。，该工具支持跨多个主流LLM（如GPT、Claude、Gemini、Llama等）进行性能比较，允许用户通过简单的声明式配置来定义测试用例和评估标准。用户可以通过命令行直接操作，并能轻松集成到CI/CD流程中，实现自动化测试。，promptfoo提供了快速上手的安装方式，包括通过npm全局安装（npm install -g promptfoo）、使用Homebrew（brew install promptfoo）或pip（pip install promptfoo）进行安装。初始化项目时，可使用“promptfoo init --example getting-started”命令加载示例配置。此外，用户也可以直接通过npx promptfoo@latest运行命令而无需预先安装。，项目强调终结“试错”式的开发模式，通过系统化的评估框架帮助团队持续监控和改进AI应用的质量与安全性。其开源代码托管于GitHub，拥有活跃的社区支持和详细的文档资源，包括官方网站、入门指南、红队测试专项说明及Discord交流频道。

title: virattt/ai-hedge-fund - An AI Hedge Fund Team
content: GitHub - virattt/ai-hedge-fund: An AI Hedge Fund Team · GitHub Skip to content You signed in with another tab or window. Reload to refresh your session. You signed out in another tab or window. Reload to refresh your session. You switched accounts on another tab or window. Reload to refresh your session. Dismiss alert virattt / ai-hedge-fund Public Notifications You must be signed in to change notification settings Fork 8.3k Star 47.9k main Branches Tags Go to file Code Open more actions menu Folders and files Name Name Last commit message Last commit date Latest commit History 803 Commits 803 Commits .github/ ISSUE_TEMPLATE .github/ ISSUE_TEMPLATE app app docker docker src src tests tests .dockerignore .dockerignore .env.example .env.example .gitignore .gitignore README.md README.md poetry.lock poetry.lock pyproject.toml pyproject.toml View all files Repository files navigation AI Hedge Fund This is a proof of concept for an AI-powered hedge fund. The goal of this project is to explore the use of AI to make trading decisions. This project is for educational purposes only and is not intended for real trading or investment. This system employs several agents working together: Aswath Damodaran Agent - The Dean of Valuation, focuses on story, numbers, and disciplined valuation Ben Graham Agent - The godfather of value investing, only buys hidden gems with a margin of safety Bill Ackman Agent - An activist investor, takes bold positions and pushes for change Cathie Wood Agent - The queen of growth investing, believes in the power of innovation and disruption Charlie Munger Agent - Warren Buffett's partner, only buys wonderful businesses at fair prices Michael Burry Agent - The Big Short contrarian who hunts for deep value Mohnish Pabrai Agent - The Dhandho investor, who looks for doubles at low risk Peter Lynch Agent - Practical investor who seeks "ten-baggers" in everyday businesses Phil Fisher Agent - Meticulous growth investor who uses deep "scuttlebutt" research Rakesh Jhunjhunwala Agent - The Big Bull of India Stanley Druckenmiller Agent - Macro legend who hunts for asymmetric opportunities with growth potential Warren Buffett Agent - The oracle of Omaha, seeks wonderful companies at a fair price Valuation Agent - Calculates the intrinsic value of a stock and generates trading signals Sentiment Agent - Analyzes market sentiment and generates trading signals Fundamentals Agent - Analyzes fundamental data and generates trading signals Technicals Agent - Analyzes technical indicators and generates trading signals Risk Manager - Calculates risk metrics and sets position limits Portfolio Manager - Makes final trading decisions and generates orders Note: the system does not actually make any trades. Disclaimer This project is for educational and research purposes only . Not intended for real trading or investment No investment advice or guarantees provided Creator assumes no liability for financial losses Consult a financial advisor for investment dec
title_zh: Virattt/ai-hedge-fund - 一支人工智能对冲基金团队
summary_zh: GitHub 项目 "virattt/ai-hedge-fund" 是一个用于概念验证的 AI 对冲基金系统。该项目旨在探索利用人工智能进行交易决策，但仅用于教育目的，不适用于真实交易或投资。，该系统的核心是一个由多个专门化 AI 智能体（Agent）协同工作的框架，每个智能体模拟一位著名投资家的策略或专注于特定分析领域。这些智能体包括：专注于估值故事的 Aswath Damodaran Agent、秉承价值投资的 Ben Graham Agent、采取激进策略的 Bill Ackman Agent、青睐成长与颠覆式创新的 Cathie Wood Agent、寻求优质企业的 Charlie Munger Agent、逆向寻找深度价值的 Michael Burry Agent、注重低风险高回报的 Mohnish Pabrai Agent、寻找“十倍股”的 Peter Lynch Agent、进行细致调研的 Phil Fisher Agent、代表印度市场的 Rakesh Jhunjhunwala Agent、捕捉宏观不对称机会的 Stanley Druckenmiller Agent 以及寻求公平价格优质公司的 Warren Buffett Agent。，此外，系统还包含四个功能性分析智能体：计算股票内在价值并生成交易信号的 Valuation Agent；分析市场情绪并生成交易信号的 Sentiment Agent；分析基本面数据并生成交易信号的 Fundamentals Agent；以及分析技术指标并生成交易信号的 Technicals Agent。，所有分析结果最终由 Risk Manager 智能体计算风险指标并设置头寸限制，再由 Portfolio Manager 智能体做出最终交易决策并生成订单。需要强调的是，该系统目前仅为模拟，不会执行任何真实交易。，项目明确声明仅供教育与研究之用，不提供任何投资建议或保证，创作者不对任何财务损失承担责任，并建议用户咨询专业财务顾问。

Control web interfaces with natural language. 🌐 English | 中文 👉 🚀 Demo | 📖 Documentation | 📢 Join HN Discussion page-agent-demo-0227.mp4 ✨ Features 🎯 Easy integration No need for browser extension / python / headless browser . Just in-page javascript. Everything happens in your web page. The best tool for your agent to control web pages. 📖 Text-based DOM manipulation No screenshots. No OCR or multi-modal LLMs needed. No special permissions required. 🧠 Bring your own LLMs 🎨 Pretty UI with human-in-the-loop 🐙 Optional chrome extension for multi-page tasks. 💡 Use Cases SaaS AI Copilot — Ship an AI copilot in your product in lines of code. No backend rewrite needed. Smart Form Filling — Turn 20-click workflows into one sentence. Perfect for ERP, CRM, and admin systems. Accessibility — Make any web app accessible through natural language. Voice commands, screen readers, zero barrier. Multi-page Agent — Extend your agent's reach across browser tabs with the optional chrome extension . 🚀 Quick Start One-line integration Fastest way to try PageAgent with our free Demo LLM: < script src =" {URL} " crossorigin =" true " > </ script > Mirrors URL Global https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/page-agent@1.5.5/dist/iife/page-agent.demo.js China https://registry.npmmirror.com/page-agent/1.5.5/files/dist/iife/page-agent.demo.js ⚠️ For technical evaluation only. This demo CDN uses our free testing LLM API . By using it, you agree to its terms . NPM Installation npm install page-agent import { PageAgent } from 'page-agent' const agent = new PageAgent ( { model : 'qwen3.5-plus' , baseURL : 'https://dashscope.aliyuncs.com/compatible-mode/v1' , apiKey : 'YOUR_API_KEY' , language : 'en-US' , } ) await agent . execute ( 'Click the login button' ) For more programmatic usage, see 📖 Documentations . 🤝 Contributing We welcome contributions from the community! Follow our instructions in CONTRIBU
title_zh: 阿里巴巴/page-agent - JavaScript 页面图形用户界面代理。用自然语言控制网页界面。
summary_zh: 阿里巴巴开源项目 page-agent 是一个基于 JavaScript 的网页内 GUI 智能体，允许用户通过自然语言控制网页界面。该项目旨在简化网页自动化操作，无需依赖浏览器扩展、Python 脚本或无头浏览器，所有操作均在当前网页的 JavaScript 环境中执行。，核心功能与特点包括：易于集成，开发者只需在网页中引入一行脚本即可快速部署；采用基于文本的 DOM 操作，无需截图、OCR 或多模态 LLM，也无需特殊权限；支持用户自带 LLM（如 GPT、Claude 等模型）进行驱动；提供美观的交互界面，支持人在回路的操作模式；并提供了一个可选的 Chrome 扩展程序，以支持跨浏览器标签页的多页面任务处理。，主要应用场景涵盖：为 SaaS 产品快速嵌入 AI Copilot 功能，无需重写后端代码；将复杂的多步骤表单填写流程简化为一句自然语言指令，适用于 ERP、CRM 及管理系统；提升网页可访问性，让用户可通过自然语言或语音命令操作任何网络应用；以及通过扩展实现跨页面的智能体任务执行。，项目提供了快速入门方式。用户可通过 CDN 一行代码集成体验演示版本，也可通过 NPM 安装进行更深入的编程式集成。在初始化时，需要配置所使用的 LLM 模型、API 基础地址和密钥等参数，之后即可调用 `execute` 方法执行如“点击登录按钮”等自然语言指令。，该项目已在 GitHub 开源，欢迎社区贡献。

Dismiss alert NousResearch / hermes-agent Public Notifications You must be signed in to change notification settings Fork 557 Star 4.6k main Branches Tags Go to file Code Open more actions menu Folders and files Name Name Last commit message Last commit date Latest commit History 1,319 Commits 1,319 Commits .github .github .plans .plans agent agent assets assets cron cron datagen-config-examples datagen-config-examples docs/ skins docs/ skins environments environments gateway gateway hermes_cli hermes_cli honcho_integration honcho_integration landingpage landingpage mini-swe-agent @ 07aa6a7 mini-swe-agent @ 07aa6a7 optional-skills optional-skills plans plans scripts scripts skills skills tests tests tinker-atropos @ 65f084e tinker-atropos @ 65f084e tools tools website website .env.example .env.example .gitignore .gitignore .gitmodules .gitmodules AGENTS.md AGENTS.md CONTRIBUTING.md CONTRIBUTING.md LICENSE LICENSE README.md README.md batch_runner.py batch_runner.py cli-config.yaml.example cli-config.yaml.example cli.py cli.py hermes hermes hermes_constants.py hermes_constants.py hermes_state.py hermes_state.py hermes_time.py hermes_time.py mini_swe_runner.py mini_swe_runner.py model_tools.py model_tools.py package-lock.json package-lock.json package.json package.json pyproject.toml pyproject.toml requirements.txt requirements.txt rl_cli.py rl_cli.py run_agent.py run_agent.py setup-hermes.sh setup-hermes.sh toolset_distributions.py toolset_distributions.py toolsets.py toolsets.py trajectory_compressor.py trajectory_compressor.py utils.py utils.py uv.lock uv.lock View all files Repository files navigation Hermes Agent ⚕ The self-improving AI agent built by Nous Research . It's the only agent with a built-in learning loop — it creates skills from experience, improves them during use, nudges itself to persist knowledge, searches its own past conversations, and builds a deepening model of who you are across sessions. Run it on a $5 VPS, a GPU cluster, or serverless infrastructure that costs nearly nothing when idle. It's not tied to your laptop — talk to it from Telegram while it works on a cloud VM. Use any model you want — Nous Portal , OpenRouter (200+ models), z.ai/GLM , Kimi/Moonshot , MiniMax , OpenAI, or your own endpoint. Switch with hermes model — no code changes, no lock-in. A real terminal interface Full TUI with multiline editing, slash-command autocomplete, conversation history, interrupt-and-redirect, and streaming tool output. Lives where you do Telegram, Discord, Slack, WhatsApp, Signal, and CLI — all from a single gateway process. Voice memo transcription, cross-platform conversation continuity. A closed learning loop Agent
title_zh: NousResearch/hermes-agent - 与你共同成长的智能体
summary_zh: NousResearch在GitHub上开源了Hermes Agent项目，这是一个具备自我进化能力的AI智能体。其核心特点是内置了完整的学习循环机制，能够从交互经验中自主创建技能，并在使用过程中持续优化这些技能。系统会主动促使自身持久化知识，支持检索过往对话历史，并能在多次会话中逐步构建并深化对用户的理解模型。，该智能体设计灵活，可部署于多种基础设施环境，包括每月5美元的VPS、GPU集群或闲置时成本极低的无服务器架构。它不依赖于本地设备，用户可以通过Telegram等应用与运行在云虚拟机上的智能体进行交互。，在模型支持方面，Hermes Agent具有高度开放性，允许用户自由选择后端模型。它兼容Nous Portal、OpenRouter（支持200多个模型）、z.ai/GLM、Kimi/Moonshot、MiniMax、OpenAI等多种服务，也支持连接用户自有的模型端点。用户可通过`hermes model`命令轻松切换模型，无需修改代码，避免了供应商锁定。，项目提供了功能完整的终端用户界面（TUI），支持多行编辑、斜杠命令自动补全、对话历史查看、任务中断与重定向，以及流式工具输出。其网关进程能够统一接入Telegram、Discord、Slack、WhatsApp、Signal及CLI等多种日常通信平台，实现跨平台对话连续性，并支持语音备忘录转录功能。，最关键的技术价值在于其实现了“封闭的学习循环”。智能体不仅能执行任务，还能从成功和失败的经验中学习，生成新的可复用技能，并不断改进现有技能库，从而随着时间的推移实现能力的实质性增长。

It provides reliable and scalable conversational AI infrastructure for individuals, developers, and teams. Whether you're building a personal AI companion, intelligent customer service, automation assistant, or enterprise knowledge base, AstrBot enables you to quickly build production-ready AI applications within your IM platform workflows. Key Features 💯 Free & Open Source. ✨ AI LLM Conversations, Multimodal, Agent, MCP, Skills, Knowledge Base, Persona Settings, Auto Context Compression. 🤖 Supports integration with Dify, Alibaba Cloud Bailian, Coze, and other agent platforms. 🌐 Multi-Platform: QQ, WeChat Work, Feishu, DingTalk, WeChat Official Accounts, Telegram, Slack, and more . 📦 Plugin Extensions with 1000+ plugins available for one-click installation. 🛡️ Agent Sandbox for isolated, safe execution of code, shell calls, and session-level resource reuse. 💻 WebUI Support. 🌈 Web ChatUI Support with built-in agent sandbox and web search. 🌐 Internationalization (i18n) Support. 💙 Role-playing & Emo
title_zh: AstrBotDevs/AstrBot - 集成多种即时通讯平台、大型语言模型、插件及AI功能的智能聊天机器人基础设施，可作为您的OpenClaw替代方案。✨
summary_zh: AstrBot是一个开源的、一体化的Agent聊天机器人平台，集成了多种主流即时通讯（IM）应用。它为个人、开发者和团队提供了可靠且可扩展的对话式AI基础设施。无论是构建个人AI伴侣、智能客服、自动化助手还是企业知识库，AstrBot都能让用户在IM平台的工作流中快速构建可用于生产环境的AI应用。，该项目的核心价值在于其高度的集成性与可扩展性。它整合了众多IM平台（如QQ、企业微信、飞书、钉钉、微信公众号、Telegram、Slack等）、多种大语言模型（LLM）、插件及AI功能，并定位为OpenClaw的替代方案。，其关键特性包括：完全免费开源；支持AI LLM对话、多模态、Agent、模型上下文协议（MCP）、技能、知识库、角色设定与自动上下文压缩；支持与Dify、阿里云百炼、Coze等外部Agent平台集成；提供丰富的插件生态，拥有超过1000个可一键安装的插件；具备Agent沙箱环境，可实现代码、Shell调用的隔离安全执行及会话级资源复用；提供WebUI和内置Agent沙箱与网络搜索的Web聊天界面支持；支持国际化（i18n）；并包含角色扮演与情感模拟等功能。，AstrBot旨在通过其模块化架构和广泛的功能集成，降低构建复杂AI聊天机器人的门槛，为用户在熟悉的IM环境中部署强大的AI助手提供一站式解决方案。

title: Nativeline AI + Cloud
summary_zh: 是一个集成人工智能与云服务的综合性平台，旨在为企业提供先进的AI解决方案和可扩展的云端基础设施。该平台的核心功能是结合了大型语言模型（LLM）如GPT和Claude等，通过优化的API接口，使用户能够轻松部署、管理和扩展AI驱动的应用程序。，平台的关键技术细节包括支持检索增强生成（RAG）架构，这提升了AI模型在特定领域知识库中的信息检索和生成准确性。此外， 提供了与GitHub等开发工具的集成，简化了代码管理和协作流程，同时确保数据安全和隐私保护。，其特点在于高度模块化和灵活性，允许企业根据需求定制AI模型和云资源，从而降低成本并提高效率。平台的价值体现在加速AI应用从开发到生产的全过程，支持实时数据处理和分析，助力企业在客户服务、内容生成和决策支持等领域实现创新。通过一站式服务， 降低了技术门槛，使更多组织能够利用前沿AI技术提升竞争力。
